question: I am satisfied with the clarity of communication from Nextstepbd.
I can easily confirm scope changes when requested.
I have experienced billing issues caused by miscommunication.
I would prefer a formal confirmation button for approvals rather than informal messages.
I find it easy to retrieve past messages or confirmations when needed.
Response times to my queries are acceptable.
I trust the company to handle my data appropriately.
I would be willing to use a brief in-app confirmation step if it saves clarification time.
I have needed the company to produce evidence of approval for billing or audit purposes.
Overall, I am satisfied with project delivery.
